title: Food for Thought: Proteomics for Meat Safety.
author: Tarbeeva S Kozlova A Sarygina E Kiseleva O Ponomarenko E Ilgisonis E
content: S-EPMC9966529 PMC9966529 Food for Thought: Proteomics for Meat Safety. Foodborne bacteria interconnect food and human health. Despite significant progress in food safety regulation, bacterial contamination is still a serious public health concern and the reason for significant commercial losses
